## Problem

What user or research problem should this solve?

## Proposed outcome

Describe the observable result, not only the implementation.

## Evidence and data

Which datasets, assumptions, or field observations support this proposal?

## Safety, legal, ethical, or licensing considerations

List relevant constraints and unknowns.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]

## Out of scope

What should deliberately remain outside this issue?
